intro: Your generous contributions support our mission to spread God's word and serve the Berthoud community. Every gift makes a difference.

methods.name: Zelle
methods.description: Send a Zelle payment using your bank or Zelle account. This is our preferred method because 100% of your donation goes directly to the church with no processing fees.
methods.note: The Zelle recipient name will simply say "Berthoud" because that is the first name of "Berthoud Church of Christ".

methods.name: PayPal / Venmo / Card
methods.description: Donate using PayPal, Venmo, or any credit/debit card through our secure PayPal donation page.

methods.name: Check / Money Order
methods.description: Mail a check or money order to support the church.

methods.name: Give Securities
methods.description: Give stocks, bonds, mutual funds, ETFs, or other property by transfer to our Schwab account.
methods.note: Long-term appreciated assets may allow a more tax-efficient gift. Please consult your tax adviser for your personal situation.
